summary: Completed senior hardening pass for podcast transcript refactor: request-reason persistence, admission idempotency safeguards, expanded regression tests, docs alignment, and multi-commit review split.
how_to_test: ./scripts/with_test_services.sh bash -lc "make migrate-test && cd python && NEXUS_ENV=test uv run pytest tests/test_podcasts.py tests/test_capabilities.py tests/test_search.py -q" && cd python && uv run ruff check nexus tests && uv run ruff format --check nexus tests && cd apps/web && npx tsc --noEmit && npm run build
risks: Transcript readiness still relies on processing_status instead of dedicated transcript_state + coverage enums
Refund semantics beyond enqueue failure (provider/stale-job reclaim) are still pending
Versioned transcript storage and anchor-preserving re-transcription are not yet implemented
Semantic transcript search and budget-aware background warming remain out of current implementation scope
